utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel with costs), activities (selected with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package: destination is specified (Lisbon, Portugal); travel_dates are specified (September 25–29, 2024); transportation is specified with type and cost (€120 flight); accommodation is specified with details and cost (€382.50 total for 5 nights); activities are fully listed with individual costs and total (€150); additional_services is included (Meals and Local Transport) with approximate cost indication (€247.50 budget remaining); total_budget is included (€652.50 under €900 limit). All items are present and sufficiently detailed.
